hook: Not sure what marketing help you need? Take the 5-minute diagnostic.
direction: Ad-hoc promo for the Marketing Diagnostic quiz at mybequestdigital.com/quiz.

facebook.text:
Most leaders don't have time to become marketing experts. And most marketing advice doesn't help. It just hands you a longer list of things to do.

We built a 5-minute diagnostic that does the opposite. Answer a few honest questions about your brand, your website, your leads, and your time, and you'll get a clear recommendation on what to fix first, and what to ignore.

No pitch. No obligation. A straight answer you can act on, whether you work with us or not.

Take the Marketing Diagnostic: https://mybequestdigital.com/quiz

instagram.text:

No pitch. No obligation. A straight answer you can act on, whether you work with us or not.

Take the Marketing Diagnostic — link in bio, or mybequestdigital.com/quiz
